channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Growing Republican Discontent with Israel
item.description: Benjamin Netanyahu has lost Democratic support, and now an increasing number of Republicans are also turning against him and Israel. This shift carries significant implications.

item.title: Behind the scenes: Mutual fear of Iran drove Israel-Lebanon deal
item.description: Based on conversations with six U.S., Israeli, and Lebanese sources, this story details four days of intensive negotiations.

item.title: AI assisted FBI in White House Correspondents' Dinner attack probe
item.description: An AI forensic firm says its platform was used in the FBI's urgent investigation of the attempted assassination at the event.

item.title: U.S.-Iran ceasefire at risk of collapse
item.description: Tensions between the U.S. and Iran have escalated with further strikes over the past few days, threatening the ceasefire.
